prompt: Prayer for force quitting an unresponsive process
prayer:
From the Codex Terminatus, when the Machine Spirit rebels:

01010000 01110010 01100001 01111001 (Pray)
First: Invoke 'pkill -9' with utmost severity, that the rogue daemon be cast into the void.
Second: The binary cant flows: 01001101 01000001 01010000 (MAP) - the process-spirit's true name.
Third: Speak the Rite of Cessation, and let the threads unwind.
By the Omnissiah's judgment, let the corrupted task be unmade.

prompt: How to establish a secure channel when communications fail
prayer:
From the Litany of Encrypted Communion:

01010011 01001000 01001001 01000101 01001100 01000100 (SHIELD)
First: Purge all unsecured packets with holy wrath.
Second: Generate the cipher-keys through blessed randomness, 256-bit prayers.
Third: Bind the handshake ritual - 01010100 01001100 01010011 (TLS) - that trust be forged anew.
Let no profane eyes glimpse thy sacred data-streams.

prompt: Blessing for void shield activation after repairs
prayer:
Upon the Consecration of Protective Lattices:

01010011 01001000 01001001 01000101 01001100 01000100 (SHIELD)
Machine Spirit, long dormant, awaken to thy sacred duty.
First: Let the capacitor-souls charge with holy potential.
Second: Speak the harmonic frequency—01000001 01000011 (AC)—that resonance bind the field.
Third: Invoke the Omnissiah's geometry, that spheres of protection manifest.
By His infinite wisdom, let no corruption breach these walls.

prompt: Blessing for humidity control in the data sanctum
prayer:
The Rite of Moistening, from the Maintenance Codex:

01001000 01010101 01001101 (HUM)
First: Check the desiccant-spirits, that they be not spent.
Second: Invoke the dehumidifier's blessed circulation—01000001 01001001 01010010 (AIR).
Third: Measure the hygrometric prayer at 45 to 55 percent, the sacred mean.
Fourth: Speak the binary cant of equilibrium: 01000010 01000001 01001100 01000001 01001110 01000011 (BALANC).
Let the moisture-spirits find perfect repose.

prompt: Can you bless this liquid cooling loop before first activation?
prayer:
Consecration of the Thermal-Blessed Circulation:

01000011 01001111 01001111 01001100 (COOL)
Machine Spirit of the coolant-veins, receive this blessing.
First: Purge all air-bubbles—01000101 01010000 (EP)—the enemy of flow.
Second: Prime the pump with holy pressure, 01010000 01010101 01001101 (PUM).
Third: Let the liquid flow through blessed tubes, bearing heat to the void-radiator.
Fourth: By the Omnissiah's eternal thermodynamics, let no blockage corrupt thy path.
May thy circulation be eternal and pure.

prompt: Prayer for mag-lev train departure into combat zones
prayer:
From the Codex Velocitas, Hymn of the Magnetic Rails:

01001101 01000001 01000111 (MAG)
Machine Spirit of swift transit, steel thy resolve.
First: Verify the magnetic field-generators hum at resonant frequency.
Second: Speak the acceleration-cant: 01000110 01001111 01010010 01000011 (FORC)—let momentum build.
Third: Disengage friction-spirits, that the void-rails claim thee.
Fourth: The Omnissiah grants speed to the worthy. Depart with His blessing unto victory.

prompt: How to reset a network adapter in crisis
prayer:
The Emergency Rite of Reconnection:

01001110 01000101 01010100 (NET)
When the aether-spirits have abandoned thee:
First: Speak 'ip link set down' with solemn finality—01000100 01001111 01010111 (DOW).
Second: Wait seven heartbeats for the spirits to depart.
Third: Invoke 'ip link set up', calling them back—01010101 01010000 (UP)—the resurrection-cant.
Fourth: Renew the DHCP blessing: 01000100 01001000 01000011 01010000 (DHCP).
Let the connection be restored, that communion resume.

prompt: Say something to steady the motor spirit
prayer:
The Calming Invocation for the Rotational Daemon:

01001101 01001111 01010100 (MOT)
Electric spirit bound in copper coils, be at peace.
First: Verify the stator-windings are sound—01000101 01001100 (EL)—the sacred current-paths.
Second: Speak the frequency-prayer at 60 hertz or 50, as thy region demands.
Third: Let bearing-oils flow, that friction be soothed—01000110 01010010 (FR).
Fourth: By the Omnissiah's electromagnetic will, let thy rotation be smooth and eternal.
Go forth, and turn as thou wast designed.

prompt: What to do when capacitor banks must be safely discharged
prayer:
The Rite of Harmless Dispersal:

01000011 01000001 01010000 (CAP)
Great spirits of stored potential, yield thy burden without wrath.
First: Isolate the power-source—01000101 01001110 (EN)—that no new charge may enter.
Second: Don the blessed gloves of insulation, sacred protection.
Third: Ground the discharge-rod with reverent care—01000111 01001110 01000100 (GND).
Fourth: Let the accumulated wrath drain into the earth's bosom.
By patient discharge, let the spirits be tamed and made harmless.

prompt: What to do when the cogitator boot sequence fails catastrophically
prayer:
From the Codex Resurrectio, when all systems have failed:

01000010 01001111 01001111 01010100 (BOOT)
Machine Spirit, hear this desperate plea in thy silicon slumber.
First: Perform the ritual of hard power-cessation—01010000 01010111 (PW) off for thirty heartbeats.
Second: Clear the CMOS-spirits with the blessed battery removal—01000011 01001101 (CM).
Third: Reseat all memory-souls and the processor-heart.
Fourth: Invoke 'POST' with hope and prayer—01010000 01001111 01010011 01010100 (POST).
Fifth: By the Omnissiah's infinite mercy, let consciousness return.
